product: MLflow trace storage in Unity Catalog is now in Public Preview
tagline: MLflow trace storage in Unity Catalog tables, previously in Beta, is now in Public Preview.
what_it_does: MLflow trace storage in Unity Catalog tables, previously in Beta, is now in Public Preview. Traces are stored in OpenTelemetry (OTel) format, access is governed through Unity Catalog schema and table permissions, and you can query traces from Databricks SQL or the MLflow Python SDK. For supported regions, see Features with limited regional availability.
why_it_matters: Traces are stored in OpenTelemetry (OTel) format, access is governed through Unity Catalog schema and table permissions, and you can query traces from Databricks SQL or the MLflow Python SDK.
